headline: Bank of America Raises Analog Devices (ADI) PT to $425 on Strong Margins and Pricing Power
summary: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is included among the 10 Best US Stocks to Invest in for Long Term. On April 13, BofA analyst Vivek Arya raised the firm’s price recommendation on Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) to $425 from $400. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The call was based on the company’s margins, […]
